heading: Step 5: Choose your connection method.
body:
You can connect using any of the following:

- [MongoDB Drivers](drivers)

- [Compass](https://www.mongodb.com/try/download/compass)

- [mongosh](mongodb-shell)

- [VS Code](mongodb-vscode)

- [MongoSQL](atlas/data-federation/query/query-with-sql)

> **Note:** To run the sample queries, choose [mongosh](mongodb-shell).
